title: Trial/Project Primary Keys Configuration
description: Schema for YAML config listing primary keys for datasets available at runtime

project_id.description: 4-digit project identifier, optionally followed by letters (e.g., 1234 or 1234mad)

keyVarsArray.description: Primary key variables for this domain

domainKeysMap.description: Map of domain/dataset name to ordered list of variables forming the primary key. Includes SDTM domains, metadata datasets, and pre-existing ADaM datasets. ADaM domains being generated by mighty should have keys defined in their domain specification files, not here.

propertyNames.description: Domain names: SDTM (2-letter, SUPPxx, or RELREC), metadata (MDxxxx), or ADaM (ADxxxx)
